method: Inferred public-footprint scoring from observed website, public channels, visible reviews, CTAs and competitor price signals. Not internal analytics.

series.label: Current public footprint
series.interpretation: Strong reputation and service catalog; weaker visible lead tracking and lifecycle automation.

series.label: Competitor pressure
series.interpretation: Marketplace-visible Botox competitors create pressure on price-sensitive leads.

series.label: Automation upside
series.interpretation: Highest upside sits in inquiry capture, booking conversion, reminders and review loops.

series.label: Lost lead risk
series.interpretation: Risk is concentrated after the first message: unqualified chats, slow follow-up, no retargeting.
